reasoning: Button base is warm parchment/gold — strong palette match. Sunset orange accents are vivid and well-placed. Sky blue and teal icon elements align with Echoes sky-blue spec. Golden trim border reinforces warm mid-value dominance. Overall mood reads BRIGHT and WARM, no grim or cold shift. Dark/shadow areas on the button border use warm-brown darks which avoid pure black, but stop short of the distinctly colored deep-teal or plum shadows the spec calls for — they read as neutral warm brown rather than expressively chromatic darks. Saturation is good but could be pushed slightly further in accent regions. No muddy desaturation, no neon, no cold corporate tones. Palette compatibility with Echoes reference swatch is solid; marginal rather than pass purely due to shadow chroma being understated.
